title: Overdrive
desc: A host presents top stories and headlines from markets, industries, government, entertainment, and sports, delivering clear, easy to understand updates for viewers about today's world.

title: American Greed
desc: A cunning swindler builds an empire on greed, only to be hunted by truth-seekers who unravel his lies, exposing the tragic fall of power built on betrayal.

title: On Assignment
desc: On Assignment follows journalists uncovering stories that matter, diving into global issues with sharp reporting, bold questions, and a commitment to truth.

title: Delivering Alpha 2025
desc: A premier investment summit featuring top financial minds discussing market trends, investment strategies, and economic outlooks for 2025.

title: The Swift Effect
desc: In-depth analysis of Taylor Swift's massive economic and cultural impact on industries, cities and global entertainment trends.

title: The Rundown
desc: Body detoxification has been practiced for centuries. Detoxes and cleanses are all the rage right now, but are detoxes causing more harm than good?

title: Squawk Box
desc: The ultimate pre-market morning news and talk programme, where the big names in business and politics bring their important stories.

title: Power Breakfast
desc: Business and finance news that tracks what is expected from the market based on cues from overnight US data and the status of markets in the East.

title: Bazaar Morning Call
desc: A host presents top stories and headlines from markets, industries, government, entertainment, and sports, delivering clear, easy to understand updates for viewers about today's world.
